false_positives_and_misleading_indicator.finding: `Project.domain` is stored and shown, but no proxy, DNS or TLS code consumes it.
An Environment page exists, but it manages project-scoped variables; there is no Environment entity.
Notification/SMTP settings models exist, but platform events do not dispatch messages.
SiteSettings fields exist without a reachable management workflow or frontend consumption.
Email helper functions exist, but no reset request/confirm API or UI is routed.
Compose execution works, but mandatory Django migrate/collectstatic makes it non-generic.
Code/containers are rebuilt at the prior commit, but database migrations, data, volumes and `.env` are not restored.
Step status and errors exist, but remote build stdout/stderr is not retained or streamed.
A manual connection test persists last status; no periodic monitor or alert exists.
Compose includes these for the control plane only; they are not managed customer resources.
Nginx serves only the control-plane SPA; application ingress is external.
A model flag exists but no middleware or serving behavior uses it.
